title: oxytropis campestris var. columbiana
intro: Oxytropis campestris var. columbiana, also known as Golden Banner or Indian Clover, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain a high concentration of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Oxytropis campestris var. columbiana include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion of its roots, and can also be used in herbal tea blends or tinctures.
